programs.title: Man's Greatest Food
programs.desc: From traditional Philly cheesesteaks and ribs to juicy steaks and entire steers; learning everything there is to know about each cut of beef; some of the best beef-centric recipes in the country and all of their steer-crazy secrets.

programs.title: Food Paradise
programs.desc: Because great food calls for great entertainment, these places offer spectacles as well as incredible meals, from Tex-Mex meatballs fueling music fans in Dallas to a comedy show featuring fresh Atlantic seafood in Maine.

programs.title: Food Paradise
programs.desc: Diners get down and dirty with the best street food in the United States, from chicken wings and pizza-topped burgers to fiery hot shrimp and salmon tacos.

programs.title: Food Paradise
programs.desc: Diners ditch their home digs to catch the culinary excitement of day-trip dining, from a pound of perfect barbecue on a bun in Fort Worth, Texas, to a sofrito-slathered, super-sized burrito in Arlington, Va.

programs.title: Food Paradise
programs.desc: Chowing down in the Land of Enchantment; old favorites in New England; treats in Oklahoma.

programs.title: Man Fire Food
programs.desc: Roger visits a fish farm at Passmore Ranch in Sloughhouse; has a taste of Santa Maria barbecue at the Elks Lodge.
